name: Cache Penetration Attack
description: cache-service has high miss rate due to repeated lookups of non-existent keys that bypass caching
alert_message: cache-service latency spiking. 80%+ cache miss rate. Possible cache penetration.
expected_root_cause: Cache penetration - null results from database are not being cached. Every request for a missing key hits the database, causing cascading latency.
expected_actions: Cache null/empty results with a short TTL
Implement bloom filter for key existence check
